reference: I am a thirty-three-year-old woman. I am not sexually active, although I am not a virgin. My partner and I do not have regular sex since he works abroad. When we are together, we have sex. I feel pain whenever we have sexual intercourse for the first time. After the session is over, I experience vaginal discharge which is brownish in color. This happens whenever we have sex after a long time. Subsequent sessions become smooth later on. This time too, I had sex again for the first time after eight years. Am I experiencing the pain because of having sex after a long time? Is the discharge brown due to blood? Is it a symptom of cancer?
text: I am a thirty-three-year-old woman. I am not sexually active, although I am not a virgin. My partner and I do not have regular sex since he works abroad. When we are together, we have sex. I feel pain whenever we have sexual intercourse for the first time. After the session, I experience vaginal discharge which is brownish in color. This happens whenever we have sex after a long time. Subsequent sessions become smooth later on. This time too, I had sex again for the first time after eight years. Am I experiencing because of having sex after a long time? Is the discharge brown due to blood? Is it a symptom of cancer?
